name: Strength in Unity
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>束</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たば</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ねられし<ruby lang="jp"><rb>力</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちから</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you Ritual or Fusion Summon using "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" or "Dark Magician": You can target 1 card your opponent controls or in their GY; banish it. You can send this face-up card from the field to the GY, then target 1 Level 7 or higher Normal Monster in your GY; add it to your hand or shuffle it into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Strength in Unity" once per turn.
eff: If you Ritual or Fusion Summon using "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" or "Dark Magician": You can target 1 card your opponent controls or in their GY; banish it. You can send this face-up card from the field to the GY, then target 1 Level 7 or higher Normal Monster in your GY; add it to your hand or shuffle it into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Strength in Unity" once per turn.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
